description: An exciting 3-day family getaway to the Big Apple! This itinerary is designed to keep both adults and children completely engaged with interactive park fun, historic sights, jaw-dropping skyscraper tours, and delicious dining options. Sights and restaurants are carefully clustered each day to minimize backtracking and ensure a seamless, relaxed family experience.

activity.name: Sarabeth's Central Park South Breakfast
activity.description: Legendary for its fluffy lemon-ricotta pancakes, gorgeous pastries, and classic American brunch, Sarabeth's provides the perfect starting line for a family day right on Central Park South.
activity.meetingPoint: 40 Central Park S, New York, NY 10019
activity.cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation up to 24 hours in advance
activity.reviewSnippet: The absolute best pancakes in NYC! The kids loved the chocolate waffles and the service was incredibly fast and friendly.

activity.name: Central Park Fun Park Experience
activity.description: A fantastic, family-oriented amusement experience right in Central Park, packed with games, interactive challenges, and wonderful outdoor photo ops.
activity.meetingPoint: Central Park East Drive & 72nd St, New York, NY 10021
activity.cancellationPolicy: Fully refundable up to 24 hours prior to starting time
activity.reviewSnippet: The kids had an absolute blast! The location is stunning and the game selection was wonderful.

activity.name: Tavern on the Green Lunch
activity.description: An iconic Central Park dining spot offering a refined yet family-friendly menu in an exquisitely restored historic pavilion and courtyard.
activity.meetingPoint: 67th Street & Central Park West, New York, NY 10023
activity.cancellationPolicy: No cancellation fee up to 24 hours before reservation
activity.reviewSnippet: Dining on the patio was magical! Highly recommend the lamb chops and the kids loved their mac and cheese.

activity.name: Empire State Building & Top of the Rock Guided Tour
activity.provider: Empire State Building & Top of the Rock Tour
activity.description: Beat the crowds with a premium guided architectural journey exploring two of Manhattan's most legendary skyscrapers and skyline lookout points.
included: Guided skip-the-line tickets to both decks
activity.meetingPoint: 20 W 34th St, New York, NY 10001 (Empire State Lobby)
activity.cancellationPolicy: Free cancellations up to 48 hours prior
activity.reviewSnippet: Absolutely incredible views and our guide was so knowledgeable. Skipping the massive lines made it worth every penny with kids!

activity.name: Uber Premium Cab Ride to Columbus Circle
activity.description: Travel in comfort and style in an upscale vehicle with top-tier professional drivers. Perfect for families looking to relax between sightseeing and dining.
activity.cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation up to 5 minutes before pickup
activity.reviewSnippet: Spotless luxury SUV and the driver arrived in minutes. High comfort for the family.

activity.name: Dinner at Asiate
activity.description: Dine high above Central Park with floor-to-ceiling windows showing glittering skyline views, enjoying contemporary Asian-fusion culinary excellence.
activity.meetingPoint: 80 Columbus Circle, 35th Floor, New York, NY 10023
activity.cancellationPolicy: Cancellations allowed up to 24 hours prior
activity.reviewSnippet: The view was jaw-dropping and every single course was a culinary masterpiece. Extremely professional staff!

activity.name: Clinton St. Baking Company Breakfast
activity.description: Widely acclaimed for serving the absolute best wild Maine blueberry pancakes in the city, this cozy Lower East Side staple offers a quintessential NYC breakfast.
activity.cancellationPolicy: No booking fees; cancel anytime before 24 hours
activity.reviewSnippet: Worth every second of waiting. The blueberry pancakes with warm maple butter are pure heaven!

activity.name: Chinatown & Little Italy Food Tour
activity.description: Embark on an immersive culture and food tasting tour navigating the fascinating history and heritage of Chinatown and Little Italy.
activity.meetingPoint: Canal St & Lafayette St, New York, NY 10013
activity.cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation up to 24 hours prior
activity.reviewSnippet: An unbelievable tour! Our kids learned so much and absolutely loved the fresh dumplings and cannoli.

activity.name: Joe's Pizza - Greenwich Village
activity.description: Grab a slice at an absolute New York City institution. Established in 1975, Joe's Pizza serves up the quintessential, authentic NY-style thin crust slice.
activity.cancellationPolicy: Free booking cancellation prior to reservation
activity.reviewSnippet: Hands down the best slice of cheese pizza in Manhattan. Fast, hot, foldy, and completely delicious!

activity.name: Statue of Liberty & Ellis Island Guided Tour
activity.description: Board a ferry from Battery Park to experience up-close history with Lady Liberty and follow the inspiring pathways of millions of immigrants at historic Ellis Island.
highlights: Scenic ferry ride with Manhattan views
Up-close look at the Statue of Liberty
included: Access to Pedestal Reserve and Ellis Island
activity.meetingPoint: Castle Clinton National Monument in Battery Park
activity.cancellationPolicy: Cancel up to 24 hours prior to booking for full refund
activity.reviewSnippet: An iconic experience. The audio tour was incredibly immersive and perfect for both the parents and teenagers.

activity.name: Uber Premium Cab Ride to Dinner
activity.description: Travel in comfort and style in an upscale vehicle with top-tier professional drivers. Perfect for families looking to relax between sightseeing and dining.
activity.cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation up to 5 minutes before pickup
activity.reviewSnippet: Spotless luxury SUV and the driver arrived in minutes. High comfort for the family.

activity.name: Balthazar Restaurant
activity.description: Step into a bustling Paris-style brasserie located in the heart of SoHo, offering a high-energy culinary theatrical atmosphere and delicious kid-friendly French favorites.
activity.cancellationPolicy: No booking fee; 24-hour reservation policy applies
activity.reviewSnippet: The energy here is infectious! The steak frites were incredibly tender and the kids devoured the freshly baked desserts.

activity.name: Chelsea Market Bakery Tour Breakfast
activity.description: Start your morning exploring the industrial-chic corridors of Chelsea Market, trying iconic pastries, artisan doughs, and delicious hot lattes.
activity.cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation up to 12 hours prior
activity.reviewSnippet: Perfect place to start the day. Great variety of fresh pastries and excellent espresso!

activity.name: The High Line & Edge Observation Deck
activity.description: Walk the historic elevated park line through Chelsea to Hudson Yards, culminating in thrilling views at the Edge - the Western Hemisphere's highest outdoor sky deck.
highlights: Walk the famous elevated High Line park
Step onto the glass-floor lookout at Edge
included: Admission ticket to Edge Observation Deck
activity.cancellationPolicy: Cancel 24 hours prior to booking for full refund
activity.reviewSnippet: Walking on the glass floor at the Edge was absolutely thrilling! The kids will never forget seeing the yellow cabs from 100 floors up.

activity.name: Mercado Little Spain Lunch
activity.description: An spectacular, bustling food hall created by Chef José Andrés, bringing the authentic tastes, tapas, and culinary culture of Spain straight to Hudson Yards.
activity.cancellationPolicy: No cancellation fees before 24 hours of arrival
activity.reviewSnippet: Amazing food options! The kids loved the wood-fired paella and the sweet churros are a absolute must.

activity.name: Museum of Modern Art (MoMA) Entry
activity.description: Discover masterpiece artwork including Van Gogh's Starry Night, Warhol's Soup Cans, and incredible kid-friendly contemporary interactive art installations.
notIncluded: Audio device rentals (digital smartphone app is free)
activity.cancellationPolicy: Full refund up to 24 hours in advance
activity.reviewSnippet: Our children had a great time using the MoMA audio guide for kids. It was wonderful, educational and fun!

activity.name: Uber Premium Cab Ride to Times Square
activity.description: Travel in comfort and style in an upscale vehicle with top-tier professional drivers. Perfect for families looking to relax between sightseeing and dining.
activity.cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation up to 5 minutes before pickup
activity.reviewSnippet: Spotless luxury SUV and the driver arrived in minutes. High comfort for the family.

activity.name: Carmine's Italian Family Dinner
activity.description: Famed for its massive, family-style platters of southern Italian delicacies, Carmine's in Times Square offers a lively, festive dining environment that families absolutely love.
activity.cancellationPolicy: Free reservation modification up to 24 hours prior
activity.reviewSnippet: Unbelievable portions and delicious food. The garlic bread and chicken parm are legendary, and sharing dishes with the kids was wonderful!
